tech_news.title: Nintendo has discounted a bunch of its Switch games in new rare sale - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: A rare first-party Nintendo games sale has just gone live on Amazon with around a dozen of the company's titles discounted.

tech_news.title: Behold the crown jewel of outrageous gaming laptops - The Verge
tech_news.description: The new Zephyrus Duo has two full-size 16-inch OLEDs, an Intel Panther Lake chip, and up to Nvidia RTX 5090 graphics. It’s awesome, and it’s a lot. It also costs a lot.

tech_news.title: PlayStation Seemingly Brings Back the DRM Policy Sony Mocked Xbox For in 2013, Sparking Massive Backlash - Wccftech
tech_news.description: Sony introduced a 30-day online check-in DRM for new PS4/PS5 digital purchases — the very policy it famously mocked Microsoft for in 2013.

tech_news.title: The Hottest Anti-AI Gadget Is a Cyberdeck - WIRED
tech_news.description: On TikTok, young women are going viral for crafting whimsical homemade computers inside purses.

tech_news.title: Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth gets a surprise demo today, complete with progression carry-over on Xbox, Switch 2 and PC - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: Play the first two chapters of Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth now, then transfer your progress over when the full game launches in June.

tech_news.title: Valve is "hard at work" on Steam Deck 2, but the company's idea of "next-gen" performance isn't possible yet - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: As the new Steam Controller is readied for launch, Valve has commented on the next Steam Deck and confirmed it won't be rushed out for small performance gains.

tech_news.title: Riven Tides - Patch Notes 1.26.0 - ARC Raiders
tech_news.description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.

tech_news.title: Microsoft asks iPhone users to reauthenticate after Outlook outage - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: After addressing a widespread outage that affected Outlook.com users worldwide on Monday, Microsoft has asked iPhone users to re-enter their credentials to regain access to their Outlook and Hotmail accounts via the default Mail app.

tech_news.title: Here's your first look at Google's upcoming 'Proactive Assistance' feature for Gemini - Android Authority
tech_news.description: Google is developing a new Proactive Assistance feature for Gemini to delivers timely, context-aware suggestions even before you ask.
